context.pre_match_notes: Six Nations Round 4. Ireland Grand Slam chasing — won 3 from 3. England at Twickenham — fortress ground. Ireland ranked World #1 but Twickenham is England's most reliable advantage. Set piece: England superiority in lineout and scrum at home. Ireland must win to keep Grand Slam alive. England must win to avoid wooden spoon.

question: Predict match direction when World #1 away team chases Grand Slam against home fortress.

verified_outcome.key_variable: twickenham_fortress_modifier + set_piece_advantage + dual_motivation_symmetry — home set piece edge decisive
